channel.title: Daily Feed (Last 48 Hours, Updated 9 AM BD)
channel.description: Daily Feed (Last 48 Hours, Updated 9 AM BD) generated by script

item.title: Checks and Balance newsletter: America’s oddly relaxing counter-terrorism strategy
item.description: John Prideaux, our US editor, on how the country’s approach has become an under-appreciated success

item.title: Why an Australia-US Rare Earth Deal Sparked Backlash in Malaysia
item.description: There are worries that processing operations in the country will drag Malaysia into the middle of China-U.S. competition.

item.title: 1 Campaign, 2 Targets: China’s Cyber Operations Hit Asian Governments and Dissidents Abroad
item.description: One track pursued traditional intelligence collection against Asian governments and defense entities; the other sought to surveil and silence overseas critics.
